title: A. O. Smith (AOS) Beats on Q1 Earnings, Revises 2023 View
text: A. O. Smith's (AOS) Q1 results benefit from higher commercial and residential water heater volumes and lower steel costs. The company improves its earnings guidance for 2023.

title: A. O. Smith (AOS) to Report Q1 Earnings: What's in Store?
text: A. O. Smith's (AOS) Q1 performance is likely to have been aided by accretive acquisitions. However, lower residential water heater volumes in the North America segment might have hurt the same.

title: 3 Manufacturing Electronics Stocks to Gain From Improving Supply Chains
